step_by_step_thinking: \boxed{D} Vasopressin antagonists act on the medullary collecting duct, where vasopressin regulates water reabsorption via aquaporin-2 channels. The evidence explicitly links vasopressin/V2 receptor actions to the collecting duct, particularly noting that aquaporin-2 is densely expressed in the medullary collecting duct and that vasopressin antagonists such as tolvaptan inhibit this pathway.
raw_response:
\boxed{D} Vasopressin antagonists act on the medullary collecting duct, where vasopressin regulates water reabsorption via aquaporin-2 channels. The evidence explicitly links vasopressin/V2 receptor actions to the collecting duct, particularly noting that aquaporin-2 is densely expressed in the medullary collecting duct and that vasopressin antagonists such as tolvaptan inhibit this pathway.
\boxed{D}
